{{Infobox location
| name = Harinfel
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Harinfel was a small village located in [[Lysander]]'s realm, situated southeast of the [[Latari Forest]]. Once a populated settlement, it was transformed into a graveyard following an attack by the [[Incarnation]] of [[Valinhall]]. Upon arriving at dawn, the black-eyed swordsman challenged all inhabitants to combat; he executed those who fled or failed to defend themselves, while sparing only those who fought well. This massacre resulted in the deaths of approximately eighty percent of the population, leaving behind mostly children and elderly survivors. The ruins of the village are located northwest of a camp situated in an open field on a high hill, and the site lies north of the village of [[Belcor]].}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Situated on a high hill southeast of the [[Latari Forest]] within [[Lysander]]'s realm, Harinfel once served as a populated village. The settlement was eventually destroyed by the [[Incarnation]], leaving behind only empty remnants of its former self. Following this devastation, the village lost nearly eighty percent of its residents. A group eventually traveled to the location, establishing a camp just outside the ruins of the former village.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Harinfel]] is located southeast of the [[Latari Forest]] in [[Lysander]]'s realm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The group is going to the village of [[Harinfel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The camp is located outside the former village of [[Harinfel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The village of [[Harinfel]] lost almost eighty percent of its residents.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Harinfel]] village lies in empty remnants on a high hill.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Incarnation]] has destroyed [[Harinfel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"That's in Lysander's realm, isn't it? It's just southeast of the Latari Forest."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
